wizardStrategy.rolloverHint: This sets the default for all categories. You can customise individual categories after creating the budget.

wizardAnalysis.analysisPeriodHint: How many months of transaction history should we analyse to suggest budget amounts?

cons: May not suit high cost-of-living areas
Fixed ratios may not fit all situations
Requires categorising every expense by group

empty.description: Create your first budget by analysing your spending history. The wizard will suggest realistic amounts based on your transactions.

create.subtitle: Analyse your spending and create a personalised budget
